response.step_by_step_log: Identified 'Gokuraku Jodo' from on-screen text at 00:07. Searched 'Gokuraku Jodo GARNiDELiA Japanese and English lyrics'. Identified 'Iinazuke Kyun' from on-screen text at 03:47. Searched 'Iinazuke Kyun Japanese and English lyrics'. Segmented video based on song performances and instrumental bridges.
response.global_summary: A two-song medley performed by Hololive VTubers. First, Nakiri Ayame performs "Gokuraku Jodo", followed by an instrumental bridge, and finally, Nakiri Ayame and Usada Pekora perform "Iinazuke Kyun".

scenes.description: Introductory scene with dark red, traditional Japanese aesthetics, featuring Nakiri Ayame.
Nakiri Ayame performs 'Gokuraku Jodo'. Text on screen identifies the title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
月明かり昇る刻
灯る赤提灯
祭囃子の合図
ふわり 蝶が誘い出す
(ちょいと覗いて見てごらん)
迷い込めば 抜け出せない
楽しいことがしたいなら
深界なら
おいでませ極楽浄土
歌えや歌え
心のままに
アナタの声を
聞かせて
踊れや踊れ
時を忘れ
今宵共に
狂い咲き
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When the moonlight rises
And the red lanterns light up
The festival music whispers
Softly inviting butterflies to dance
(Take a peek and see for yourself)
If you wander in, you cannot escape
If you want to do something fun, in this deep world
Come on in to the paradise land, singing, singing
Just as your heart desires
Let me hear your voice
Dance, dance, forget the time
Tonight, together, in this wild frenzy.

scenes.description: Instrumental bridge scene transitioning between the two performances.
Nakiri Ayame and Usada Pekora perform 'Iinazuke Kyun'. Text on screen identifies the title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どいつもこいつもなんだかやっぱの天気
気になるあのこの悩みもきっとあるでしょ
ざっとで半端な憂鬱ももうはむれ同じ
あんたの頭の中はぐちゃぐちゃさ
ドンマイ弊害育児のない魔法て意識
いけないいけない事柄なんてないから
イーアルサンスージャンケンポンでさおゆ
渦中で大パニックででんにみだれて
きみはもう
ハイスピードだな
あーりゃまこりゃま
おまちかね
ハチャでメチャなドラマ
派手にドラマが
のるよ
イイイイナズキュン I love you
なのも24時間
愛もちょうだい
はて？
イイイイいつかバックュン
アイアイアイアイもう1/2じゃもののたんない
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Everything, everything, it's the usual forecast
If you're curious, surely you'll hear the worries of that girl
Thrown into a dull sadness, all together
In your head, it's messy, messy
Don't mind, even if there's no parenting, it's magic awareness
There's no such thing as an impossible situation
Ier, Zun, Jan-Ken-Pon for it
In the whirlpool of love, being tossed about
This is already high speed, oh my, oh my
Waiting for it, acting rashly in drama
In the drama of love, I'm riding on it
I, I, I, I love you, I'm yours 24/7
Give me some love, huh?
I, I, I, I, I, 1/2 of me is not enough.
